methodology_fix: Rust and native are now compared on refreshed full-dataset HDF5 rows with recall measured at 10 while searching top_k=100.
root_cause: On the strict-ef same-schema lane (ef=138), the compare remains datatype-aligned (BF16 on both sides) and recall-credible, but native is still about 1.05x faster at a slightly lower recall. This artifact is now treated as strict-lane stop/go evidence only.
action: Keep this artifact as strict-ef same-schema stop/go evidence. Project-level leadership is now judged by separate near-equal-recall authority evidence in final proof artifacts.
